description: The ``Can Be Grabbed`` node takes in a slot and a grabber from a user, and checks if this slot can be grabbed using that provided grabber. It will not check if it is being grabbed, only if it could be grabbed.

fields.Slot: The Slot to check if it can be grabbed.
fields.Grabber: The grabber on a user (``LeftHand`` or ``RightHand``).
fields.* ([[Type:bool|bool]]): Returns if this slot can be grabbed with the provided grabber from a user.
